description: Universal-core set-membership predicates — FAILING surface (§55.1). oneOf(["Admin","Editor"]) on "Guest" → .OneOfFailed(set); notIn(["banned"]) on "banned" → .NotInFailed(set). isValid false per field, compound rollup false.
rationale: §55.1 oneOf/notIn test set membership; §55.9 OneOfFailed / NotInFailed carry the SUBSET as the set payload (§55.1 confirms the payload is the declared subset, not a base enum).
